creator: r@robakdesign.com
text:
On 12:40:07 am 02/10/2007 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of www/hastymail,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/116798 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/116798
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

I can take care of that, thanks for pointing it. I need about week or so,
to organise some free time for fixing and testing. If you think thats too
long, you are free to go with it.

Kind Regards,
Bartek Rutkowski
